prompt: Summarize the following text in one sentence. Text: "The Amazon rainforest spans over 5.5 million square kilometers across nine South American countries. It is home to roughly 10% of all known species on Earth. Deforestation driven by logging, agriculture, and mining has reduced its size significantly over the past 50 years. Scientists warn that continued loss could push the rainforest past a tipping point, turning parts of it into savanna. Conservation efforts now focus on sustainable land use and international funding to slow the destruction."
expected: The Amazon rainforest is a vast, biodiverse ecosystem threatened by deforestation, prompting conservation efforts to protect it.

prompt: Summarize the following text in one sentence. Text: "Electric vehicles are becoming more common as battery costs continue to fall. Many governments now offer tax incentives to encourage adoption. Charging infrastructure has expanded rapidly in cities but remains limited in rural areas. Automakers are investing heavily in new electric models to compete with traditional gasoline vehicles. Analysts predict electric vehicles could make up half of new car sales within the next decade."
expected: Electric vehicle adoption is rising quickly due to falling battery costs, government incentives, and growing automaker investment.

prompt: Summarize the following text in one sentence. Text: "Honeybees play a critical role in pollinating crops that make up a large share of the global food supply. In recent years, bee populations have declined due to pesticide exposure, habitat loss, and disease. Farmers and researchers are working together to develop pesticide alternatives and restore wildflower habitats. Some regions have also begun tracking hive health with sensors to detect early signs of colony collapse. Protecting bee populations is seen as essential to maintaining food security."
expected: Honeybee populations are declining due to pesticides and habitat loss, threatening pollination and food security, so researchers are working to protect them.

prompt: Summarize the following text in one sentence. Text: "Remote work surged during the pandemic and has remained popular with many employees. Companies report mixed results, with some citing productivity gains and others noting challenges in collaboration and company culture. Hybrid work models, combining office and remote days, have emerged as a common compromise. Commercial real estate markets have been affected as demand for office space shifts. Employers are now revising policies to balance flexibility with team cohesion."
expected: Remote and hybrid work have become common since the pandemic, and employers are adjusting policies to balance flexibility with collaboration.

prompt: Summarize the following text in one sentence. Text: "Coral reefs cover less than 1% of the ocean floor but support around 25% of all marine species. Rising ocean temperatures cause coral bleaching, which weakens or kills coral colonies. Ocean acidification, driven by increased carbon dioxide absorption, further threatens reef structures. Marine biologists are experimenting with heat-resistant coral strains to help reefs survive warming waters. Protecting reefs is considered vital for fisheries, tourism, and coastal protection worldwide."
expected: Coral reefs, though small in area, support massive marine biodiversity and are threatened by warming and acidifying oceans.
